description: You are the QA Manager preparing for an audit. Restructure the global Document Categories in Redmine to match new ISO quality standards. Rename the 'User documentation' category to 'User Manuals' and create two new categories: 'Test Plans' and 'Audit Reports'. Delete the 'Technical documentation' category, ensuring that any existing records, such as the 'Legacy System Spec' in the 'ISO 13485 Prep' project, are reassigned to the 'Test Plans' category.
